ksa_text: Knowledge of data and AI governance structures at the board and executive committee level, including oversight responsibilities, reporting cadences, decision rights allocation, and escalation frameworks.

Knowledge of information technology (IT) supply chain security and risk management policies, requirements, and procedures.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA LS-K-010 (LS, Knowledge) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4731 is insufficient to establish relevance to self-service analytics, business-led data exploration, and low-code BI at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nist_ai_rmf=0.473, eu_ai_act=0.470, nice=0.428) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4731 below threshold for weak fit domain. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does LS-domain KSA LS-K-010 (composite 0.4731) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4731 for LS domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per Leadership competencies in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles are limited to peer influence and technical mentorship, not organizational strategy. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Citizen Data Scientist at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms LS domain KSA at composite 0.4731 is not a standard requirement for Citizen Data Scientist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4731, domain LS, scope weak fit. High confidence.
